case_title: MILLER, ROBERT VS WILLIAMS, DONALD R.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, DONALD R. ACTION WAS BROUGHT IN THE WRONG VENUE, PROPER VENUE IS HAYWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED; NOTICE MAILED TO PARTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,252.70 FILED BY MILLER, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, DONALD R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, DONALD R.
